<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Duolingo English Test — Official Certificate</title>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
</head>
<body>

<div class="backdrop">
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-inner">

      <!-- Header -->
      <div class="top-row">
        <div class="brand">
          <img class="brand-lockup" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Duolingo English Test">
        </div>
        <div class="official-tag">OFFICIAL CERTIFICATE</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Identity -->
      <div class="identity">
        <img class="photo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Candidate photo">
        <div class="id-text">
          <div>
            <p class="name">Al Raeal Al Baraa Abdullah<br>Ayedh Abdullah</p>
            <p class="meta-line"><strong>Date of birth:</strong> September 16, 2006</p>
            <p class="meta-line"><strong>Test taken:</strong> April 13, 2026</p>
          </div>
          <div class="cert-meta">
            <p class="meta-line"><strong>Certificate ID:</strong> 37lou2ksyalxuq7u</p>
            <p class="meta-line"><strong>Link:</strong><br><a href="https://certs.duolingo.com/37lou2ksyalxuq7u" target="_blank" rel="noopener">certs.duolingo.com/37lou2ksyalxuq7u</a></p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Overall Score -->
      <div class="overall-heading">Overall Score</div>
      <div class="overall">
        <div class="gauge-box">
          <div class="gauge-wrap">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 170 160">
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="goldGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
                  <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffcd3c"/>
                  <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffb300"/>
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <path class="gauge-arc-bg" d="M 28.71,112.5 A 65,65 0 1 1 141.29,112.5" pathLength="100"/>
              <path class="gauge-arc-fg" style="--pct:0.8" d="M 28.71,112.5 A 65,65 0 1 1 141.29,112.5" pathLength="100"/>
            </svg>
            <div class="gauge-number">130</div>
          </div>
          <div class="gauge-range"><span>10</span><span>160</span></div>
        </div>

        <div class="advanced-box">
          <p class="advanced-title">Advanced: <span class="cefr">CEFR C1</span></p>
          <ul class="adv-list">
            <li><span class="tick"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><path d="M2 6l3 3 5-6" stroke="#1c274a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Can understand a wide range of demanding, longer texts, and recognize implicit meaning.</li>
            <li><span class="tick"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><path d="M2 6l3 3 5-6" stroke="#1c274a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Can express themselves fluently and spontaneously, using language flexibly and effectively for various purposes.</li>
            <li><span class="tick"><svg viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><path d="M2 6l3 3 5-6" stroke="#1c274a" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></span>Can produce clear, well-structured, detailed text on complex subjects, with controlled use of connectors and cohesive devices.</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Individual Subscores -->
      <div class="section-label">Individual Subscores</div>
      <div class="grid4">
        <div class="grid-cell"><div class="grid-label">SPEAKING</div><div class="grid-num">130</div></div>
        <div class="grid-cell"><div class="grid-label">WRITING</div><div class="grid-num">100</div></div>
        <div class="grid-cell"><div class="grid-label">READING</div><div class="grid-num">135</div></div>
        <div class="grid-cell"><div class="grid-label">LISTENING</div><div class="grid-num">145</div></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Integrated Subscores -->
      <div class="section-label">Integrated Subscores</div>
      <div class="grid4">
        <div class="grid-cell">
          <div class="grid-label">PRODUCTION</div>
          <div class="grid-num">115</div>
          <div class="grid-sub">Ability to speak and write</div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid-cell">
          <div class="grid-label">LITERACY</div>
          <div class="grid-num">120</div>
          <div class="grid-sub">Ability to write and read</div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid-cell">
          <div class="grid-label">COMPREHENSION</div>
          <div class="grid-num">140</div>
          <div class="grid-sub">Ability to read and listen</div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid-cell">
          <div class="grid-label">CONVERSATION</div>
          <div class="grid-num">140</div>
          <div class="grid-sub">Ability to listen and speak</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="footnote">All scores are on a scale of 10–160. Learn more about scores at <strong>englishtest.duolingo.com/scores</strong></div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</body>
</html>
